name: veilforge
description: Pre-APS privacy-readiness tooling for Solidity projects targeting Arc.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @veilforge/shared && npm run build -w @veilforge/scanner && npm run build -w @veilforge/contracts && npm run build -w @veilforge/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @veilforge/shared && npm run build -w @veilforge/scanner && npm run dev -w @veilforge/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @veilforge/shared && npm run typecheck -w @veilforge/scanner && npm run typecheck -w @veilforge/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @veilforge/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @veilforge/scanner && npm run test -w @veilforge/contracts && npm run test -w @veilforge/web
scripts.scan:demo: npm run build -w @veilforge/scanner && node packages/scanner/dist/cli.js scan examples/vulnerable-payroll/Payroll.sol
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
